sql_array: SELECT event_time FROM test_datetime WHERE event_time = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20230911131415);
UPDATE test_datetime SET event_time = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20231005120000) WHERE event_time = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20230911131415);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_datetime WHERE event_time > YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20230901000000);
